name: appointment-check-in
title: Appointment Check-In
description: Patient-facing arrival flow as a vertical stepper with estimated wait and a call-by-name reassurance line.

props.name: estimatedWait
props.description: Shown as a range, e.g. "15–25 min".

props.name: reassurance
props.description: Reassurance line; defaults to a call-by-name message.

clinicalNotes: Show only this patient's flow: on a shared waiting-room screen this must never display other patients' identifying information, so the component takes a single patient's steps and holds no queue of names. Present times as ranges, not promises — "15–25 min" sets expectations without turning a busy clinic into a broken commitment when it slips. The call-by-name reassurance reduces the anxious screen-watching that a bare queue number encourages. Presentation only; step status and wait estimates come from your scheduling system.
notes: medcn-original, server component (no state). Vertical stepper from primitives; privacy-first (single patient).
